hotel_name: Khách sạn SUNRISE Bạc Liêu (SUNRISE Hotel Bac Lieu)

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: New hotel. Clean. Convenient. Diverse and tasty menu of drinks at reasonable prices. Breakfast is ordered a la carte and has an extra charge, but is quite good. However, the hotel's facade looks like it's on a major road, but in reality, it's more like a dead-end, with a lawn in front of the hotel.

reviews.title: No hot water/ not fixing refrigerator when asked .Not provide extra room key when asked
reviews.positives: Okay
reviews.negatives:
Not respond to the problem .
Not fix the problem

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is right in the center, convenient for moving to tourist spots. The male staff is enthusiastic and lovely, recommending delicious places for my family to eat. This is my first time in Bac Lieu and I have a good impression.

reviews.title: Convenient, safe and friendly staff
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, comfy beds, TV had netflix and youtube, water pressure was good, wifi worked well.
reviews.negatives: Mosquitos in bedroom, bedsheets had some dead mosquito stains.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: This is the first time I am taking my family on a trip, so I am quite nervous. Thanks to the staff, I was able to check in very quickly and they were very supportive. The room is quite spacious, the balcony is fresh and airy, and the room is clean. Overall, it was wonderful.

reviews.title: Good memory anyway!
reviews.positives: New modern facilities
reviews.negatives: No welcome drink or breakfast included, the bathroom is little small, the view of side balcony looking directly to an abandoned door-opened room.

reviews.title: Very satisfied.
reviews.text:
Quiet space  
Clean rooms  
The evening staff and receptionist are charming  
Coffee is 20k/cup + lychee tea 30k/cup (very delicious), I really love the lychee tea here. And the iced tea is also good hehe.  
Beef noodles are okay  
Prices are reasonable  
When I went, the hotel was fully booked. It's close to the center, so dining is quite convenient.  
I asked the hotel to help me rent a motorbike. The person who delivered the motorbike was kind, and the price was reasonable.  
Thank you everyone for helping me have a wonderful vacation 🥰🥰

reviews.title: review
reviews.text: The room is clean, the staff is friendly, it's quiet and close to the square, easy to get around. The soundproofing of the room is quite good, there is a karaoke restaurant nearby but you can't hear anything because it's closed.

reviews.title: Great service, clean relaxing accommodation
reviews.text: Nice and clean hotel, newer room with reasonably priced breakfast ordering. Friendly staff and service. Great location next to Vincom mall and easy access to all of Bac Lieu. Thank you for our family's awesome time in Bac Lieu.

reviews.title: Horrendous service and impolite hotel staff
reviews.positives: The rooms of the hotels are okay.
reviews.negatives: Nobody in the hotel speaks English. We tried asking how to get to some local attractions by using translator, but the front desk staff did not know any of the locations. We asked for a local tour guides but we were told "sorry, we cannot assist you". Unfortunately they could also not assist with food, since there is no food at all in the hotel, not even breakfast. Our room had no hot water for shower and the cleaning team did not provide toilet paper. We rented a motorbike from the hotel. The bike we received had defective breaks, defective speedometer, was leaking oil and came with complete empty tank. Since we left before sunrise, we only realized that when it was already too late. Without functioning breaks we almost ended up in an accident. All in all the service of the hotel is horrendous. For complaining about it, the manager got back to us by charging us for late check out and cleaning the mattress of our bed. We were asked for additional 500k VND. We were happy once we had left the place.

reviews.title: This is advice from a meticulous traveler...
reviews.positives: After staying in approximately 34 hotels in about 23 cities in Vietnam over 3 months, I chose this hotel as one of the top 3 I've ever stayed in. This is my third stay here, and I'm very pleased with the same excellent standards. I can recommend it to everyone for its location, price/performance ratio, service quality, view, and the balcony where I woke up to the sound of birds.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Lovely comfortable bed, great shower.  Quiet street.  Good blackout curtains for when Mr Soleil wakes up so he didn't wake me up.

Small cafe/bar (and breakfast menu) handy for a cold beer after a day in the sun or cà phê sữa đá to kick start a new day.
